/usr/bin/ar qc libVoxelEngine.a CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/audio/Audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/audio/AudioManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/block/Block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/block/BlockState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/block/Face.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/block/Geometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/block/MultiBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/block/Side.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/block/VariantBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/block/Vertex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/data/RegistryManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/data/TextureLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/input/InputSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/input/events/GLFWEventSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/level/Chunk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/level/FlatTerrainGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/level/LayerBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/level/World.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/level/data/DenseGrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/level/events/LevelEventSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/physics/AABB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/physics/AABBCollider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/random/PerlinNoise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/random/Random.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/render/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/render/RenderPassRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/render/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/render/concrete/CompositePass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/render/concrete/DirectionalShadowPass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/render/concrete/ScenePass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/render/concrete/TransparentPass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/render/events/EngineEventSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/render/utility/UtilityShaders.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/scene/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/scene/Skybox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/scene/Sun.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/utility/Algorithms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/utility/CoordUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/utility/EventSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelEngine.dir/src/utility/Rotation.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libVoxelEngine.a
